text:
What's wrong with the subj, Martin? There are port name and some more info, ain't there?)

(In reply to Martin Wilke from comment #1)
> please when you submit a problem, subject is for the port where a problem
> is, and some more information. All this will help to get your problem faster
> solved.
> 
> thank you.
